pkgmetadata.longdescription: OpenTelemetry System Metrics Instrumentationpypi.. pypi image httpsbadge.fury.iopyopentelemetry-instrumentation-system-metrics.svg target httpspypi.orgprojectopentelemetry-instrumentation-system-metricsInstrumentation to collect system performance metrics.Installation------------ pip install opentelemetry-instrumentation-system-metricsReferences---------- OpenTelemetry System Metrics Instrumentation httpsopentelemetry-python-contrib.readthedocs.ioenlatestinstrumentationsystem_metricssystem_metrics.html_ OpenTelemetry Project httpsopentelemetry.io_
